question_text: Let 𝒖𝟏, 𝒖𝟐, 𝒖𝟑, 𝒗𝟏, 𝒗𝟐, 𝒗𝟑 be vectors in ℝ4. Let 𝑈 be the span of {𝒖𝟏, 𝒖𝟐, 𝒖𝟑}

options.A: nd let 𝑉 be the span of {𝒗𝟏, 𝒗𝟐, 𝒗𝟑}.
options.C: onsider the following statements: (I) If the dimension of 𝑈∩𝑉 is 2 and the dimension of 𝑈 is 3, then {𝒗𝟏, 𝒗𝟐, 𝒗𝟑} is linearly dependent. (II) If 𝑈+ 𝑉= {𝒖+ 𝒗⁡ ∶𝒖∈𝑈, 𝒗∈𝑉} = ℝ4, then either {𝒖𝟏, 𝒖𝟐, 𝒖𝟑} is linearly independent or {𝒗𝟏, 𝒗𝟐, 𝒗𝟑} is linearly independent. Which of the above statements is/are true?
